RED_EVOLVE_POWER.description: Whenever you draw a [gold]Status[/gold] card, draw more cards.
RED_EVOLVE_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you draw a [gold]Status[/gold] card, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards.
RED_EVOLVE_POWER.title: Evolve
RED_FLEX_POWER.description: Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of this turn.
RED_FLEX_POWER.smartDescription: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of this turn.
RED_FLEX_POWER.title: Flex
RED_BRUTALITY_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, lose HP and draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
RED_BRUTALITY_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, lose [blue]{SelfDamage}[/blue] HP and draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards.
RED_BRUTALITY_POWER.title: Brutality
RED_BERSERK_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold].
RED_BERSERK_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of each turn, gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.
RED_BERSERK_POWER.title: Berserk
GREEN_CORPSE_EXPLOSION_POWER.description: When this enemy dies, deal damage equal to its Max HP to ALL enemies.
GREEN_CORPSE_EXPLOSION_POWER.smartDescri: When [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] dies, deal damage equal to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times its Max HP to ALL enemies.
GREEN_CORPSE_EXPLOSION_POWER.title: Corpse Explosion
RED_METALLICIZE_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold].
RED_METALLICIZE_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
RED_METALLICIZE_POWER.title: Metallicize
RED_FIRE_BREATHING_POWER.description: Whenever you draw a [gold]Status[/gold] or [gold]Curse[/gold], deal damage to ALL enemies.
RED_FIRE_BREATHING_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever you draw a [gold]Status[/gold] or [gold]Curse[/gold], deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
RED_FIRE_BREATHING_POWER.title: Fire Breathing
RED_COMBUST_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, lose HP and deal damage to ALL enemies.
RED_COMBUST_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, lose 1 HP and deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
RED_COMBUST_POWER.title: Combust
